cli command dispatch > dispatches blast-radius command with explicit contract path

parseIntegerArg > parses valid integers and respects minimum
parseIntegerArg > rejects malformed numeric strings
parseIntegerArg > holds strict parsing invariant for fuzzed inputs
parseCsvList > parses comma-separated values and strips empties
parseCsvList > is robust for fuzzed comma/noise input
run > exits with code 1 for unknown command
run > routes remediate run command - async, covered by cli-dispatch.test.ts
run > routes gap-case open/resolve commands
run > does not exit for help or version
isDirectExecution > returns true for direct module path
isDirectExecution > returns true when entrypoint is a symlink to the module
agent-first throughput integration > verifies happy-path remediation and review-gate flow
agent-first throughput integration > propagates review-gate failure before downstream evidence stages
agent-first throughput integration > is deterministic for identical inputs and policy
agent-first throughput integration > keeps loop orchestration overhead p95 <= 2500ms across 30 fixture runs
agent-first throughput integration > aborts mixed stale + race path with policy hold
automation-run > creates a succeeded run and artifact on first execution
automation-run > replays succeeded run when key repeats without force
automation-run > rejects force override while existing run is in_progress

automation-run > replays failed runs and supports force rerun

runBlastRadius > treats replace mode without custom rules as no blast-radius rules

runBranchProtect > creates a ruleset when none exists

runBranchProtect > falls back to legacy reviewPolicy.requiredChecks when branchProtection is absent

runBranchProtect > matches existing ruleset when include selector uses wildcard patterns
runBranchProtect > does not match an existing ruleset when target branch is excluded

runBranchProtect > preserves stricter existing pull request protections
runBranchProtect > preserves existing multi-ref include scope when updating
runBranchProtect > preserves existing required status check metadata entries
runBranchProtect > preserves global scope when existing includes are empty

gap-case > openGapCase > creates gap-case with optional fields

gap-case > resolveGapCase > requires evidenceUrl

gap-case > resolveGapCase > returns E_NOT_FOUND for unknown case

gap-case > store persistence > handles corrupt store gracefully

runGardener > does not write QUALITY_SCORE.md in dry-run mode
runIndexContext > indexes markdown files in nested directories
runIndexContext > returns ERROR when --harness-dir value is missing
runIndexContext > returns ERROR when --harness-dir value is another flag
runIndexContext > returns ERROR when harnessDir escapes baseDir
runIndexContext > returns ERROR when harnessDir is a symlink that resolves outside baseDir
runIndexContext > accepts nested harnessDir paths that do not exist yet
runIndexContext > returns actionable ABI mismatch error when store init fails
runInit > package manager detection > detects pnpm from pnpm-lock.yaml
runInit > package manager detection > detects yarn from yarn.lock
runInit > package manager detection > detects npm from package-lock.json
runInit > package manager detection > defaults to npm when no lockfile exists
runInit > dry-run mode > does not create files in dry-run mode
runInit > normal mode > creates files in empty directory
runInit > normal mode > skips existing files without --force
runInit > force mode > overwrites existing files with --force
runInit > path traversal protection > blocks path traversal with ..
runInit > path traversal protection > blocks traversal to sibling directory
runInit > error handling > returns error for invalid base path
runInit > file content > creates valid contract.json
runInit > file content > creates valid memory.json baseline
runInit > file content > creates codex local environment actions with mapped icons
runInit > file content > updates autogenerated codex environment file without --force
runInit > file content > creates valid memory.json baseline
runInit > file content > includes package manager in workflow
runInit > file content > uses npm run for npm script commands
runInit > file content > includes recommended security scanners in contributing template
runInit > file content > enforces required fields in issue templates
runInit > file content > enforces strict commit and hook governance in templates
EXIT_CODES > defines expected exit codes
--track flag > creates manifest for new files
--track flag > creates backups for existing files
--track flag > rejects symlinks with error
--rollback flag > restores created files (deletes them)
--rollback flag > restores modified files from backup
--rollback flag > fails when no manifest exists
--rollback flag > fails when manifest is corrupted
--rollback flag > blocks path traversal in manifest
--check-updates flag > fails when no manifest exists
--check-updates flag > reports update available for old version
--check-updates flag > reports up to date for same version
--check-updates flag > defaults to 0.0.0 for manifest without version
--update flag > fails when no manifest exists
--update flag > updates files and manifest version
--update flag > is no-op when already up to date
--interactive flag > returns proposed changes without writing files
--interactive flag > marks new files as 'create' action
--interactive flag > marks existing files as 'skip' action without --force
--interactive flag > marks existing files as 'modify' action with --force
--interactive flag > detects package manager for rendering
generateDiff > generates diff for new file (create action)
generateDiff > generates diff for modified file
generateDiff > returns empty string for skip action
--migrate flag > fails when no contract exists
--migrate flag > succeeds when contract is already at latest version
--migrate flag > migrates legacy 1.0.0 contracts to 1.2.0
--migrate flag > fails when contract has invalid JSON
--migrate flag > fails when contract is missing version field
--migrate flag > preserves user customizations during migration
--migrate flag > preserves contract content when already up to date
detectContractVersion > returns null when contract doesn't exist
detectContractVersion > returns version from valid contract
detectContractVersion > returns null for contract without version
detectContractVersion > returns null for invalid JSON
observability-gate > runObservabilityGate > passes with valid labels
observability-gate > runObservabilityGate > detects violations in labels
observability-gate > runObservabilityGate > returns error for invalid JSON
observability-gate > runObservabilityGate > returns error for invalid label schema
observability-gate > runObservabilityGate > handles empty labels
observability-gate > runObservabilityGateCLI > returns SUCCESS for valid labels
observability-gate > runObservabilityGateCLI > returns VIOLATION_FOUND when violations exist
observability-gate > runObservabilityGateCLI > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid JSON
pilot-evaluate > loadPrLeadTimeData > returns empty and error for missing file
pilot-evaluate > loadPrLeadTimeData > returns error for unsupported schema version
pilot-evaluate > loadPrLeadTimeData > loads valid lead time data
pilot-evaluate > loadRemediationEvents > returns empty array for missing file
pilot-evaluate > loadRemediationEvents > loads valid JSONL events
pilot-evaluate > loadRemediationEvents > returns error for unsupported schema
pilot-evaluate > loadRollbackEvents > returns empty array for missing file
pilot-evaluate > loadRollbackEvents > loads valid rollback events
pilot-evaluate > loadIncidents > returns empty array for missing file
pilot-evaluate > loadIncidents > loads valid incidents
pilot-evaluate > loadPendingIncidents > returns empty array for missing file (optional)
pilot-evaluate > loadPendingIncidents > loads valid pending incidents
pilot-evaluate > calculateLeadTimeMetrics > returns zeros for empty data
pilot-evaluate > calculateLeadTimeMetrics > returns zeros when only pilot has data
pilot-evaluate > calculateLeadTimeMetrics > calculates improvement correctly
pilot-evaluate > calculateRollbackReliability > returns 1 when no triggers exist
pilot-evaluate > calculateRollbackReliability > calculates reliability for successful rollbacks
pilot-evaluate > calculateRollbackReliability > calculates reliability for mixed results
pilot-evaluate > calculateRollbackReliability > ignores non-trigger events
pilot-evaluate > countHighRiskAutomationIncidents > returns 0 for no incidents
pilot-evaluate > countHighRiskAutomationIncidents > counts only high severity automation confirmed incidents
pilot-evaluate > countUnresolvedCriticalIncidents > counts unresolved high severity incidents
pilot-evaluate > countUnresolvedCriticalIncidents > counts pending high severity incidents
pilot-evaluate > calculateClassificationLatency > returns 0 for no incidents
pilot-evaluate > calculateClassificationLatency > calculates p95 latency
pilot-evaluate > calculateClassificationLatency > skips incidents without classification
pilot-evaluate > calculateRepoSampleSizes > returns empty for no eligible entries
pilot-evaluate > calculateRepoSampleSizes > counts eligible entries per repo
pilot-evaluate > calculateEvidenceCompleteness > returns 1 for empty data
pilot-evaluate > calculateEvidenceCompleteness > calculates completeness ratio
pilot-evaluate > capturePilotMetrics > returns metrics with errors when artifacts missing
pilot-evaluate > capturePilotMetrics > captures metrics from valid artifacts
pilot-evaluate > runPilotEvaluate > returns error when artifacts directory missing
pilot-evaluate > runPilotEvaluate > returns hold for missing required artifact (sample size 0)
pilot-evaluate > runPilotEvaluate > returns promote when all thresholds met
pilot-evaluate > runPilotEvaluate > returns hold when high-risk automation incidents exist
pilot-evaluate > runPilotEvaluate > returns hold when sample size too small
pilot-evaluate > runPilotEvaluate > writes output file when specified
pilot-evaluate > PILOT_THRESHOLDS > has required threshold values
pilot-rollback > runPilotRollback > returns VALIDATION error when incidentId is missing
pilot-rollback > runPilotRollback > returns VALIDATION error when mode is invalid
pilot-rollback > runPilotRollback > returns PRECONDITION error when contract not found
pilot-rollback > runPilotRollback > transitions from manual to autonomous and creates artifacts
pilot-rollback > runPilotRollback > transitions from autonomous to manual
pilot-rollback > runPilotRollback > creates rollback-marker.json artifact
pilot-rollback > runPilotRollback > appends to rollback-events.jsonl
pilot-rollback > runPilotRollback > writes to output file when specified
pilot-rollback > runPilotRollback > defaults to manual mode when contract lacks policy
pilot-rollback > runPilotRollbackCLI > returns SUCCESS exit code on successful rollback
pilot-rollback > runPilotRollbackCLI > returns VALIDATION exit code for missing incident ID

plan-gate command > runPlanGate > checks sections in strict mode
plan-gate command > runPlanGate > reports stale plans (non-draft only)

testcase.name: runPolicyGate > with max-tier > passes when tier equals max-tier
runPolicyGate > with max-tier > passes when tier is lower than max-tier
runPolicyGate > with max-tier > fails when tier exceeds max-tier
runPolicyGate > with max-tier > passes high-tier files when max-tier is high
runPolicyGate > without max-tier > passes all files when no max-tier specified
runPolicyGate > empty file list > passes with low tier when no files are provided
runPolicyGate > tier-threshold invariants > is monotonic across max-tier thresholds
runPolicyGate > validation > rejects invalid max-tier value
runPolicyGate > validation > returns error for missing contract
runPolicyGateCLI > returns SUCCESS (0) when gate passes
runPolicyGateCLI > returns POLICY_VIOLATION (1) when gate fails
runPolicyGateCLI > returns VALIDATION_ERROR (1) for invalid max-tier
testcase.system-err: Invalid max-tier: must be one of high, medium, low {"error":{"code":"VALIDATION_ERROR","message":"Invalid max-tier: must be one of high, medium, low"}}

testcase.name: prompt-gate > validatePrompt > returns failure for non-existent file
prompt-gate > validatePrompt > detects missing sections in feature template
prompt-gate > runPromptGate > returns error for missing file
prompt-gate > runPromptGateCLI > returns SUCCESS for valid feature document
prompt-gate > runPromptGateCLI > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for missing file
prompt-gate > runPromptGateCLI > validates all prompt template types
remediate command > exit codes > exits SUCCESS for valid remediation with all findings processed
remediate command > exit codes > exits USAGE for invalid JSON input
remediate command > exit codes > exits USAGE for findings with missing required fields
remediate command > exit codes > fails closed when explicit contract path cannot be loaded
remediate command > exit codes > exits SUCCESS when all findings produce actions (including requires_human)
remediate command > exit codes > exits INTERNAL when git command fails
remediate command > exit codes > exits POLICY for TOCTOU race condition
remediate command > exit codes > hard-fails apply mode on non-disposable workspace
remediate command > exit codes > allows apply mode in detected git worktree checkout
remediate command > exit codes > hard-fails apply mode when disposable workspace is dirty
remediate command > exit codes > applies low-risk patch in single-finding transaction mode
remediate command > exit codes > rolls back a finding transaction on HEAD change during apply
remediate command > finding normalization > normalizes CodeQL findings correctly
remediate command > finding normalization > normalizes Codex findings correctly
remediate command > finding normalization > accepts single finding (not array)
remediate command > finding normalization > rejects findings with invalid commit SHA
remediate command > finding normalization > rejects findings with invalid line numbers
remediate command > dry-run mode > respects dryRun option
remediate command > dry-run mode > codex provider defaults to dry-run
remediate command > tier-based policy > processes low severity findings
remediate command > tier-based policy > processes medium severity findings for codeql
remediate command > tier-based policy > produces requires_human action for high severity findings (codeql max tier is medium)
remediate command > stdin input > reads from stdin when findings is '-'
remediate command > file read errors > exits USAGE when file not found
replay command > runReplayCLI > returns VALIDATION_ERROR when no trace ID provided
testcase.system-err: Error: Trace ID required. Use --trace-id <id> or --list

testcase.name: replay command > runReplayCLI > returns VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid trace ID format
testcase.system-err: Error: Invalid trace ID format. Expected trace-<16 hex chars>, got: invalid-id

testcase.name: replay command > runReplayCLI > returns TRACE_NOT_FOUND for non-existent trace
testcase.system-err:
Error: Trace not found: trace-aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
Use --list to see available traces.

testcase.name: replay command > runReplayCLI > lists traces with --list
replay command > runReplayCLI > outputs JSON when --json is set
runReviewGate > returns validation error for invalid SHA
runReviewGate > returns not_found when check run does not exist
runReviewGate > returns verified when check run is completed with success
runReviewGate > enforces reviewer independence when coding actor is sole approver
runReviewGate > allows solo approval when reviewer independence is disabled
runReviewGate > defaults reviewer independence to enforced when not explicitly configured
runReviewGate > uses the newest review state per reviewer before deduplicating approvals
runReviewGate > rejects approvals without a commit id when enforcing reviewer independence
runReviewGate > blocks merge readiness when required checks are missing
runReviewGate > passes when required checks are present and successful
runReviewGate > uses the newest check run when duplicate required check names exist
runReviewGate > returns needsRerun when check run is completed with failure
runReviewGate > returns error on timeout with fail action
postRerunCommentIfNeeded > returns hold when authz preflight fails
postRerunCommentIfNeeded > posts rerun comment after authz preflight passes
search command > returns lexical results from rg JSON output
search command > returns semantic unavailable exit code for semantic mode
search command > prioritizes lexical results over semantic in hybrid mode
search command > validates mode in CLI parsing
search command > applies include/exclude path filters to lexical results
search command > fails when --strict-semantic is set and semantic is unavailable
search command > returns actionable ABI mismatch warning for semantic store init errors
ui-loop commands > runUIFast > supports prepare mode and writes artifact metadata
ui-loop commands > runUIFast > defaults to execute mode
ui-loop commands > runUIFast > treats fast-loop timeout as success
ui-loop commands > runUIFast > returns COMMAND_FAILED when execute mode command fails
ui-loop commands > runUIFast > returns execution_disabled when kill switch is enabled in execute mode
ui-loop commands > runUIVerify > supports prepare mode with contract command and args
ui-loop commands > runUIVerify > returns NOT_FOUND when Playwright is missing
ui-loop commands > runUIVerify > executes in default mode and can fail with COMMAND_FAILED
ui-loop commands > runUIVerify > maps dryRun to prepare even when mode=execute is provided
ui-loop commands > runUIVerify > returns execution_disabled when kill switch is enabled in execute mode
ui-loop commands > runUIVerify > returns JSON payload with artifact fields
ui-loop commands > runUIExplore > supports prepare mode and emits artifact metadata
ui-loop commands > runUIExplore > executes by default
ui-loop commands > runUIExplore > returns COMMAND_FAILED when execute mode command fails
ui-loop commands > runUIExplore > returns execution_disabled when kill switch is enabled in execute mode
ui-loop commands > runUIExplore > keeps canonical policy fields aligned across command adapters
ui-loop commands > runUIExplore > enforces kill-switch mode matrix across adapters
runVerifyGreptile > shows actionable warning when PAT is used for installation endpoint
runVerifyGreptile > verifies installation with GitHub App JWT when app credentials are provided
brainstorm detector max-age handling > respects maxAgeDays override
brainstorm detector max-age handling > supports legacy maxAge alias used by older callers
brainstorm detector max-age handling > prefers maxAgeDays when both maxAgeDays and maxAge are provided
brainstorm detector max-age handling > falls back to default max age when maxAgeDays is NaN
brainstorm detector max-age handling > fails strict mode when required sections are missing
getChecksForFile > returns auth checks for auth paths
getChecksForFile > returns UI checks for component paths
getChecksForFile > returns empty array for unknown paths
getChecksForFile > matches CSS files
resolveChecks > aggregates checks for multiple files
resolveChecks > deduplicates checks
resolveChecks > uses defaults when no patterns match
resolveChecks > returns empty for empty file list
resolveChecks > maps files to their checks
resolveBlastRadiusRules > returns defaults when no custom rules are provided
resolveBlastRadiusRules > merges default and custom rules in merge mode
resolveBlastRadiusRules > replaces defaults with custom rules in replace mode
resolveBlastRadiusRules > returns empty rules when mode is replace and custom rules are omitted
getBlastRadiusInfo > identifies matched rules
getBlastRadiusInfo > counts total unique checks
getBlastRadiusInfo > identifies highest impact files
summarizeBlastRadius > includes file count
summarizeBlastRadius > includes matched patterns
summarizeBlastRadius > includes required checks
summarizeBlastRadius > mentions defaults when used
loadContract > loads a valid contract
loadContract > loads valid loopStageContracts semantic parity data
loadContract > enforces size limit using UTF-8 bytes, not character count
loadContract > allows wide but shallow JSON payloads
loadContract > rejects excessively deep JSON payloads
loadContract > merge policy dual-shape support > accepts legacy array-style merge policy
loadContract > merge policy dual-shape support > accepts roadmap object-style merge policy and normalizes to array
loadContract > merge policy dual-shape support > accepts mixed legacy and roadmap shapes and normalizes
loadContract > merge policy dual-shape support > rejects invalid roadmap merge policy with missing requiredChecks
validateContract > accepts minimal valid contract with version only
validateContract > applies defaults for optional fields
validateContract > accepts blastRadiusRules and blastRadiusRulesMode
validateContract > rejects invalid blastRadiusRulesMode
validateContract > rejects malformed blastRadiusRules
validateContract > rejects invalid risk tier
validateContract > rejects missing version
validateContract > accumulates multiple errors
validateContract > accepts valid risk tier rules
validateContract > reviewPolicy > accepts reviewPolicy with optional requiredChecks
validateContract > reviewPolicy > accepts reviewPolicy with optional enforceReviewerIndependence
validateContract > reviewPolicy > rejects reviewPolicy when requiredChecks is not an array
validateContract > reviewPolicy > rejects reviewPolicy when enforceReviewerIndependence is not boolean
validateContract > branchProtection > accepts branchProtection with requiredChecks
validateContract > branchProtection > rejects branchProtection when requiredChecks is not an array
validateContract > branchProtection > rejects when reviewPolicy.requiredChecks is not a subset of branchProtection.requiredChecks
validateContract > branchProtection > accepts when reviewPolicy.requiredChecks is a subset of branchProtection.requiredChecks
validateContract > runtimePolicy > accepts runtimePolicy with optional createIssueOnAgentFindings
validateContract > runtimePolicy > rejects non-boolean createIssueOnAgentFindings
validateContract > rejects __proto__ key (prototype pollution)
validateContract > rejects constructor key (prototype pollution)
validateContract > pilotGapCasePolicy > accepts valid pilot gap-case policy
validateContract > pilotGapCasePolicy > accepts pilot gap-case policy with optional storePath
validateContract > pilotGapCasePolicy > rejects invalid defaultSlaHours (non-positive)
validateContract > pilotGapCasePolicy > rejects invalid enabled (non-boolean)
validateContract > pilotRollbackPolicy > accepts valid pilot rollback policy in manual mode
validateContract > pilotRollbackPolicy > accepts valid pilot rollback policy in autonomous mode
validateContract > pilotRollbackPolicy > rejects invalid mode
validateContract > pilotRollbackPolicy > rejects missing completionMarkerPath
validateContract > pilotAuthzPolicy > accepts valid pilot authz policy
validateContract > pilotAuthzPolicy > accepts empty allowlists (deny-all default)
validateContract > pilotAuthzPolicy > rejects non-array githubScopeAllowlist
validateContract > pilotAuthzPolicy > rejects non-boolean enforceBranchProtection
validateContract > pilotAuthzPolicy > rejects __proto__ in repoAllowlist (prototype pollution)
validateContract > remediationPolicy > accepts valid remediation policy
validateContract > remediationPolicy > rejects invalid autoApplyMaxTier
validateContract > remediationPolicy > rejects negative retryLimit
validateContract > remediationPolicy > rejects missing required fields
validateContract > loopStageContracts > accepts complete loop stage semantic contracts
validateContract > loopStageContracts > rejects missing required loop stages
validateContract > loopStageContracts > rejects invalid fail policy values
ralph-runtime contract > builds canonical PyPI package spec
ralph-runtime contract > builds pinned git spec
ralph-runtime contract > builds pinned git fallback spec
ralph-runtime contract > extracts version from CLI output
ralph-runtime contract > exposes fallback policy contract constants
validateOllamaUrl > accepts localhost loopback URLs
validateOllamaUrl > accepts IPv6 loopback URL syntax
validateOllamaUrl > rejects non-loopback hosts
indexFile > parses CRLF frontmatter metadata correctly
indexFile > reindexes unchanged content when force is true
indexFile > rejects files outside the configured basePath
indexFile > rejects symlink files that resolve outside the configured basePath
OllamaClient.embed > supports concurrent embed calls without aborting earlier requests
detectStaleDocs > parses CRLF frontmatter without treating doc as stale
detectStaleDocs > ignores generated QUALITY_SCORE.md for stale detection and counts
escapeMarkdown > escapes backslashes
escapeMarkdown > escapes backticks
escapeMarkdown > escapes asterisks and underscores
escapeMarkdown > escapes angle brackets
escapeMarkdown > escapes @ mentions with zero-width space
escapeMarkdown > escapes URLs with zero-width space
escapeMarkdown > escapes multiple special characters together
formatRerunComment > creates valid comment for valid SHA
formatRerunComment > escapes markdown in reason
formatRerunComment > throws for invalid SHA
formatRerunComment > includes timestamp in ISO format
formatRerunComment > sanitizes token substitutions and values in reason text
hasRerunCommentForSha > returns found:false when no comments match
hasRerunCommentForSha > returns found:false for comments from other users
hasRerunCommentForSha > returns found:false for comments without marker
hasRerunCommentForSha > returns found:false for comments older than 24 hours
hasRerunCommentForSha > returns found:true for matching comment within 24 hours
hasRerunCommentForSha > returns found:false for different SHA
hasRerunCommentForSha > returns found:false for invalid SHA input
mutation queue > serializes concurrent mutation operations
mutation queue > retries retryable failures and eventually succeeds
mutation queue > uses base delay on the first retry
mutation queue > returns an error after exhausting retry attempts
mutation queue > computes backoff with jitter bounds
validateSha > accepts valid 40-character lowercase hex SHA
validateSha > rejects SHA with uppercase letters
validateSha > rejects SHA that is too short
validateSha > rejects SHA that is too long
validateSha > rejects SHA with invalid characters
validateSha > rejects empty string
validateSha > throws ShaValidationError with correct message
isValidSha > returns true for valid SHA
isValidSha > returns false for invalid SHA
isValidSha > returns false for non-string values
isValidSha > acts as type guard
requiresEvidence > returns true when file matches required pattern
requiresEvidence > returns false when file does not match any pattern
requiresEvidence > matches multiple patterns
requiresEvidence > handles empty patterns array
isFormatAllowed > returns true for allowed formats
isFormatAllowed > returns false for disallowed formats
isFormatAllowed > handles single format policy
enforceEvidencePolicy > passes when no violations exist
enforceEvidencePolicy > fails when evidence type is not allowed
enforceEvidencePolicy > fails when required evidence is missing
enforceEvidencePolicy > passes when changed files do not require evidence
enforceEvidencePolicy > handles multiple violations
getFilesRequiringEvidence > filters files matching required patterns
getFilesRequiringEvidence > returns empty array when no files match
summarizePolicy > summarizes policy with required patterns
summarizePolicy > handles empty requiredFor
detectImageFormat > detects PNG format from magic bytes
detectImageFormat > detects JPEG format from magic bytes
detectImageFormat > returns null for invalid image format
detectImageFormat > returns null for buffer too small
detectImageFormat > returns null for text file
detectVideoFormat > detects MP4 format from magic bytes
detectVideoFormat > detects WebM format from magic bytes
detectVideoFormat > returns null for image formats
detectVideoFormat > returns null for invalid video format
detectVideoFormat > returns null for buffer too small
detectVideoFormat > returns null for buffer with exactly 7 bytes (one less than minimum)
detectVideoFormat > returns null for text file
detectEvidenceFormat > detects PNG as image format
detectEvidenceFormat > detects JPEG as image format
detectEvidenceFormat > detects MP4 as video format
detectEvidenceFormat > detects WebM as video format
detectEvidenceFormat > returns null for unrecognized format
getEvidenceType > returns screenshot for PNG
getEvidenceType > returns screenshot for JPEG
getEvidenceType > returns video for MP4
getEvidenceType > returns video for WebM
validatePath > allows paths within base directory
validatePath > allows nested paths within base directory
validatePath > throws PathTraversalError for path traversal attempt
validatePath > throws PathTraversalError for absolute path escape
validatePath > handles non-existent paths via parent directory
validatePath > allows non-existent nested paths under base directory
loadEvidenceFile > returns FILE_NOT_FOUND for missing file
loadEvidenceFile > returns FILE_NOT_FOUND for missing nested file with absent parent chain
loadEvidenceFile > returns INVALID_FORMAT for non-image file
loadEvidenceFile > returns INVALID_FORMAT for corrupted PNG
loadEvidenceFile > returns FILE_TOO_LARGE for oversized file
loadEvidenceFile > returns PATH_TRAVERSAL for path escape attempt
loadEvidenceFile > validates valid PNG file
loadEvidenceFile > validates valid JPEG file
loadEvidenceFile > handles .jpeg extension
loadEvidenceFile > never throws for fuzzed malformed path inputs
loadEvidenceFile > validates valid MP4 file
loadEvidenceFile > validates valid WebM file
loadEvidenceFile > includes evidenceType for image files
loadEvidenceFile > applies video size limit to video files
loadEvidenceFile > allows video files within video size limit
loadEvidenceFile > applies image size limit to image files even with higher video limit
sanitizeError > redacts GitHub PATs
sanitizeError > redacts home paths
sanitizeError > preserves commit hashes (not 20+ alphanumeric)
sanitizeEvidenceText > rewrites gh auth token command substitution to placeholder
sanitizeEvidenceText > redacts token query params in URLs
sanitizeEvidenceText > redacts expanded GitHub PAT values
validatePath > allows paths within the base directory
validatePath > allows nested non-existent paths within the base directory
validatePath > rejects sibling paths that share a base prefix
hashString > returns consistent hash for same input
hashString > returns different hashes for different inputs
hashString > produces fixed-length output
sanitizeLabelValue > returns short values unchanged
sanitizeLabelValue > hashes long values
looksLikeUserInput > detects long strings as user input
looksLikeUserInput > detects sentences as user input
looksLikeUserInput > allows short categorical values
validateLabelValue > returns null for valid label
validateLabelValue > detects JSON in label
validateLabelValue > detects email-like values
validateLabelValue > detects user input
validateLabelValue > detects long or user-input-like values
validateMetricLabels > returns empty array for valid labels
validateMetricLabels > collects all violations
isPayloadLoggingAllowed > allows when debug is enabled
isPayloadLoggingAllowed > denies when debug is disabled
estimateCardinality > calculates unique count
estimateCardinality > calculates ratio
estimateCardinality > detects high cardinality
estimateCardinality > handles empty array
updateMetrics > increments pass^k and accumulates counters on success
calculateTrends > computes error rate from cumulative metric deltas (not snapshot sums)
calculateTrends > returns stable defaults for short history
loadMetrics > filters malformed history entries to avoid downstream crashes
checkQuestionSLA > treats invalid asked_at timestamps as overdue
runMemoryGateCLI > calculates trends from persisted history including current run
runMemoryGateCLI > continues when metrics persistence fails
runMemoryGate > fails closeout validation when closeout date is not a valid ISO date
runPreflightGate > uses default harness.contract.json when contractPath is omitted
runPreflightGate > skips risk-tier when no default contract exists
runPreflightGate > skips risk-tier when files option is omitted
command policy > does not use grep in workflows or scripts
createResolver > classifies auth files as high-risk
createResolver > prioritizes specific auth scope over generic test suffix
createResolver > defaults to medium for unknown paths
createResolver > handles nested paths with **
createResolver > prefers specific subtree patterns over generic suffix globs
createResolver > prefers exact file matches over wildcard patterns
resolveOverallTier > returns high when any file is high-risk
resolveOverallTier > returns medium when all files are medium or lower
resolveOverallTier > returns medium for empty file list
resolveOverallTier > is order-invariant and equals highest severity of per-file resolution
resolveOverallTier > handles fuzzed glob patterns without crashing resolver
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > valid inputs > normalizes valid CodeQL finding with all fields
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > valid inputs > normalizes CodeQL finding with minimal fields
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > valid inputs > includes endLine when provided
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > valid inputs > uses rule.id as title fallback when name is missing
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > valid inputs > uses rule.name as description fallback when description is missing
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > severity mapping > maps 'error' to 'high'
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > severity mapping > maps 'warning' to 'medium'
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > severity mapping > maps 'note' to 'low'
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > severity mapping > maps undefined to 'low'
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - structure > rejects null input
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - structure > rejects undefined input
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - structure > rejects non-object input
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - structure > rejects missing id
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - structure > rejects missing location
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - structure > rejects missing commitSha
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - structure > rejects missing location.path
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - structure > rejects missing location.startLine
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - id > rejects empty id
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - id > rejects id exceeding max length
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - id > accepts id at max length
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - SHA > rejects invalid SHA format
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - SHA > rejects SHA with uppercase
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - SHA > rejects SHA that is too short
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - path > rejects path traversal attempt with ../
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - path > rejects shell metacharacters in path
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - path > rejects pipe character in path
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - path > rejects backtick in path
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - path > rejects dollar sign in path
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - path > rejects empty path
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - path > rejects path exceeding max length
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - line numbers > rejects startLine < 1
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - line numbers > rejects startLine > max
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - line numbers > rejects non-integer startLine
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - line numbers > rejects endLine < startLine
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - line numbers > accepts endLine equal to startLine
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - timestamp > rejects invalid timestamp format
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - timestamp > rejects non-ISO timestamp
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodeqlFinding > input validation - timestamp > generates timestamp when not provided
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > valid inputs > normalizes valid Codex finding with all fields
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > valid inputs > normalizes Codex finding with minimal fields
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > valid inputs > uses ruleName as title
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > valid inputs > uses message as description
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > severity mapping > maps 'critical' to 'high'
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > severity mapping > maps 'warning' to 'medium'
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > severity mapping > maps 'info' to 'low'
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > severity mapping > maps undefined to 'low'
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - structure > rejects null input
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - structure > rejects non-object input
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - structure > rejects missing id
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - structure > rejects missing filePath
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - structure > rejects missing line
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - structure > rejects missing commitSha
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - SHA > rejects invalid SHA format
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - path > rejects shell metacharacters in path
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - path > rejects empty path
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - line numbers > rejects line < 1
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - line numbers > rejects non-integer line
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - timestamp > rejects invalid timestamp format
finding-normalizer > normalizeCodexFinding > input validation - timestamp > generates timestamp when not provided
finding-normalizer > type guards > CodeQL type guard rejects wrong structure
finding-normalizer > type guards > Codex type guard rejects wrong structure
finding-normalizer > error raw field > includes raw input in error for debugging
tierAllowsAuto > allows low tier when max is low
tierAllowsAuto > allows low tier when max is medium
tierAllowsAuto > allows low tier when max is high
tierAllowsAuto > allows medium tier when max is medium
tierAllowsAuto > allows medium tier when max is high
tierAllowsAuto > allows high tier when max is high
tierAllowsAuto > rejects medium tier when max is low
tierAllowsAuto > rejects high tier when max is low
tierAllowsAuto > rejects high tier when max is medium
tierAllowsAuto > rejects unknown severity tier (fail closed)
tierAllowsAuto > rejects when max tier is unknown (fail closed)
tierAllowsAuto > rejects when both tiers are unknown (fail closed)
RemediationOrchestrator > ancestry handling > skips stale findings (SHA not in ancestry)
RemediationOrchestrator > ancestry handling > processes findings on HEAD (no ancestry check needed)
RemediationOrchestrator > ancestry handling > skips findings when commit is not HEAD SHA (strict SHA-only)
RemediationOrchestrator > tier-based actions > commits low severity findings (codeql allows medium)
RemediationOrchestrator > tier-based actions > commits medium severity findings (codeql allows medium)
RemediationOrchestrator > tier-based actions > produces requires_human action for high severity findings (codeql max is medium)
RemediationOrchestrator > tier-based actions > applies dry run mode from provider defaults (codex)
RemediationOrchestrator > tier-based actions > respects explicit dryRun option
RemediationOrchestrator > tier-based actions > skips findings for unconfigured providers
RemediationOrchestrator > TOCTOU race detection > uses fresh HEAD from checkpoint 1 (not input)
RemediationOrchestrator > TOCTOU race detection > detects TOCTOU race condition at checkpoint 2 (mid-processing)
RemediationOrchestrator > TOCTOU race detection > detects TOCTOU race condition at checkpoint 3 (final)
RemediationOrchestrator > TOCTOU race detection > succeeds when HEAD is stable throughout all checkpoints
RemediationOrchestrator > batching and performance > does not call isAncestor with strict SHA-only filtering
RemediationOrchestrator > batching and performance > reports cache hits for HEAD SHA findings
RemediationOrchestrator > without GitHub client > processes all findings without ancestry checks
RemediationOrchestrator > without GitHub client > uses input headSha when no GitHub client
RemediationOrchestrator > telemetry > reports correct telemetry data
RemediationOrchestrator > strict SHA-only filtering (Phase 2) > only processes findings bound to exact HEAD SHA
RemediationOrchestrator > high-risk human mediation (Phase 2) > produces requires_human action for high-severity findings
RemediationOrchestrator > high-risk human mediation (Phase 2) > does not add high-severity to skipped list
RemediationOrchestrator > high-risk human mediation (Phase 2) > auto-applies low and medium severity findings
tracer > generateTraceId > generates stable IDs
tracer > generateTraceId > generates unique IDs for different seeds
tracer > generateTraceId > generates IDs with correct prefix
tracer > captureTrace > captures a new trace
tracer > captureTrace > includes sanitized environment
tracer > addTraceEvent > adds event to trace
tracer > addTraceEvent > throws for non-existent trace
tracer > loadTrace > loads saved trace
tracer > loadTrace > returns null for non-existent trace
tracer > listTraces > lists traces sorted by creation time
tracer > listTraces > returns empty array when no traces exist
tracer > replayTrace > returns error for non-existent trace
tracer > replayTrace > performs dry run without executing
tracer > replayTrace > replays events with callback
tracer > validateTrace > validates correct trace
tracer > validateTrace > rejects trace with invalid ID
tracer > validateTrace > rejects trace with invalid date
tracer > validateTrace > rejects non-object
runSilentErrorDetector > ignores *.test.ts files in default src scan
runSilentErrorDetector > does not duplicate detections when multiple regexes match same catch block
brainstorm workflow > generateBrainstormFilename > generates correct filename format
brainstorm workflow > generateBrainstormFilename > sanitizes special characters
brainstorm workflow > createBrainstorm > creates brainstorm file with frontmatter
brainstorm workflow > findBrainstorms > returns empty array when no brainstorms exist
brainstorm workflow > findBrainstorms > finds all brainstorms
brainstorm workflow > findRecentBrainstorms > filters by date range
brainstorm workflow > requiresBrainstorm > returns true when no matching brainstorm exists
brainstorm workflow > requiresBrainstorm > returns false when matching brainstorm exists
brainstorm workflow > updateBrainstormStatus > updates status and supersededBy
plan workflow > generatePlanFilename > generates correct filename format
plan workflow > generatePlanFilename > sanitizes special characters
plan workflow > createPlan > creates plan file with frontmatter
plan workflow > createPlan > links to origin brainstorm when provided
plan workflow > createPlan > auto-discovers related brainstorm
plan workflow > findPlans > returns empty array when no plans exist
plan workflow > findPlans > finds all plans
plan workflow > checkMissingOrigin > returns missing=false when plan has origin
plan workflow > checkMissingOrigin > returns missing=true when related brainstorm exists but no origin
plan workflow > updatePlanStatus > updates plan status
